about.title: About Me
about.p1: I’m — a Fullstack Developer passionate about building modern, efficient web apps. I turn complex problems into clean, user-friendly solutions and enjoy exploring new technologies.
about.p2: On the frontend, I craft responsive, accessible interfaces with React, Redux, TypeScript, HTML, and CSS. On the backend, I build robust APIs with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB, handling authentication and data securely.
about.p3: As a team lead, I coordinated development across multiple projects, guided teammates, and ensured smooth collaboration, delivering high-quality features on time and boosting overall team productivity.
about.p4: I continuously challenge myself with new technologies and real-world projects, always aiming to create impact and growth — both in the product and the team.

hero.name: I'm Dmytro Kovbasiuk
hero.info: I build modern responsive web applications

aqua.desc: Team project. Aqua Track is a hydration tracking web application that helps users monitor daily water intake and build healthy habits. As a Front-End Team Lead, I coordinated UI development using React, managed application state with Redux, and supported the team throughout the development process. The backend is built with Node.js and MongoDB.
aqua.role: Front-End Team Lead. Coordinated UI development, managed state with Redux, and supported the team.
aqua.tech: React, Redux Toolkit, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, CSS Modules

finance.desc: Financial Analyst is a personal full-stack project for tracking income and expenses. Users can add transactions, analyze financial data monthly and yearly, and visualize it with charts. The application includes secure authentication and is currently under active development.
finance.role: Full Stack Developer. Designed and implemented both frontend and backend architecture.
finance.tech: React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Chart.js, JWT Authentication

istore.desc: IStore is a full-stack e-commerce application where users can browse products, view details, add items to the cart, and complete purchases. It includes role-based authentication (admin, user, demo). Demo account: Email: demo.admin@gmail.com | Password: 111111.
istore.role: Full Stack Developer. Implemented product catalog, authentication, and cart logic.
istore.tech: Next.js, Redux Toolkit, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Tailwind CSS

movie.desc: A React application that integrates a public movie API to display dynamic content. The project demonstrates API integration, state management, and responsive UI development.
movie.role: Front-End Developer. Implemented API integration, search functionality, and responsive UI.
movie.tech: React, REST API, Axios, CSS Modules

phonebook.desc: A full-stack contact management application where users can register and manage personal contacts. Features include adding, editing, deleting, sorting, and filtering contacts.
phonebook.role: Full Stack Developer. Implemented authentication, CRUD operations, and UI.
phonebook.tech: React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, JWT Authentication

portfolio.desc: Team portfolio project with a responsive layout. As a Team Lead, I managed the GitHub repository, reviewed pull requests, and coordinated the development process. I also implemented the 'Work Together' section.
portfolio.role: Front-End Team Lead. Managed repository, reviewed PRs, and coordinated development.

sparkart.desc: A modern landing page designed to showcase a creative brand and its services. Focused on clean UI, responsiveness, and engaging layout.
sparkart.role: Front-End Developer. Implemented layout, animations, and responsive design.

truck.desc: A React application for searching and filtering data from an external API. Demonstrates dynamic rendering, API integration, and interactive UI.
truck.role: Front-End Developer. Implemented filtering logic, API integration, and UI components.

seo.desc: A modern landing page for a digital SEO and marketing agency built with Next.js. Showcases services such as SEO optimization, analytics, and digital strategies. Responsive design is in progress.
seo.role: Front-End Developer. Implemented layout and UI components. Responsive design in progress.

webTech.desc: A modern responsive landing page for a digital agency built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS using a mobile-first approach. Focused on clean UI, responsiveness, and performance optimization.
webTech.role: Front-End Developer. Developed responsive UI and optimized performance.

approach.title: My Approach
approach.subtitle: A clear, user-centered process ensures scalable and maintainable results.
approach.s1: Start by understanding business goals, users, and project needs to build a solid foundation.
approach.s2: Plan the architecture and choose technologies that fit the project perfectly.
approach.s3: Craft responsive, clean, and maintainable interfaces with attention to detail.
approach.s4: Test rigorously, optimize, and ensure cross-device compatibility.
approach.s5: Deploy efficiently and provide long-term support to keep projects scalable and reliable.
